faq.how_to_buy: Open a Purchase Help ticket and staff will guide you through the order process.
faq.delivery_time: Delivery time depends on the product. Staff will confirm timing before payment.
faq.refunds: Refunds and replacements are handled by staff case-by-case. Never share passwords or sensitive information.
faq.support: Open a support ticket and describe the issue clearly with screenshots or proof where possible.

welcome_start_here: Welcome MEMBER  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ We're glad to have you here in 1964!  Take a moment to read the rules, grab your roles, and enjoy your stay.
